project_info.name: Dmitry Gofman Personal Brand Page
project_info.archetype: Engineering Craft (Custom mix of High-Contrast and Organic/Earthy)

decorative_system.blueprint_grid: SVG background pattern repeating with 1px stroke of #5B6651 at 0.15 opacity. Use larger grid squares (e.g., 50px or 100px).
decorative_system.corner_ticks: Absolute positioned inline SVGs at the corners of sections/cards acting like registration marks. 10px lines, 1px thick, colored #B87333.
decorative_system.cad_geometry: Faint geometric circles and intersecting lines behind hero and worldview sections.

motion_specs.scroll: Smooth scrolling via CSS behavior: smooth.
motion_specs.entrance: Sections translate Y by 30px and fade in from opacity 0 to 1 using IntersectionObserver. Transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1).
motion_specs.hover: Cards shift up -5px, border color transitions to clay/copper, background slightly lightens. Transition: all 0.3s ease.
motion_specs.cursor: Optional subtle custom cursor for interactive elements.

hero.headline: ENGINEER. BUILDER. SEEKER.
hero.subheadline: I'm Dmitry Gofman - a multidisciplinary engineer and hands-on builder exploring the space between physical systems, technology, craft, and human potential.

worldview.title: A Philosophy of Building
worldview.content: Philosophical narrative section exploring the intersection of engineering discipline and craft warmth.

cards.title: Multidisciplinary R&D
cards.desc: Navigating ambiguity to build first-of-kind systems.

cards.title: Electromechanical Systems
cards.desc: Bridging the gap between software and the physical world.

cards.title: Manufacturing Reality
cards.desc: Scaling concepts into tangible, producible hardware.

cards.title: Team & System Integration
cards.desc: Aligning people and technology to achieve complex goals.

builders_path.title: The Workshop & Craft
builders_path.content: Narrative detailing the journey through hands-on making, hardware, and physical creation.

human_dimension.title: People, Teams, Culture
human_dimension.content: Focusing on the human operating system, collaboration, and personal development.

vision.title: Future Studio
vision.content: Exploring future ventures, studios, and the next horizon of multi-disciplinary work.

images.alt: Close up of precision copper and machined steel mechanical parts
images.suggestion: Use with heavy dark gradient overlay (e.g., linear-gradient to bottom from #0A0A0A to transparent) to keep text readable.
Use as a parallax background or section divider, low opacity.

images.alt: Warm craft workshop at night, dark ambiance with glowing copper lighting
images.suggestion: Display as a standalone image or side-by-side with text to evoke the workshop feeling.

images.alt: Close-up of a microprocessor and circuit board placed on technical design sketches
images.suggestion: Use for the Engineering section background or visual accent.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Produce ONLY raw HTML, CSS, and JS (no React, no Tailwind). Ensure all CSS and JS is embedded or strictly separated without a build step. 2. Implement a responsive grid layout. 3. Recreate the blueprint background using an embedded SVG pattern in the CSS background-image. 4. Use Google Fonts for typography. 5. Implement IntersectionObserver in JS for the scroll-triggered fade-ins. 6. Use Lucide icons via CDN script (https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest). 7. Add subtle registration marks via CSS ::before/::after pseudoelements for the 'engineering' aesthetic. 8. Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key elements. 9. Keep HTML semantics clean and accessible.
